title: Bedrock Sword by Banana
description: Adds a super OP Bedrock Sword!
body:
This **Bedrock Sword** is SUPER OP
# What it does
-   It does 1,000 HP!
-   1,000 uses
-   Makes you unbeatable
# Why to avoid another player if they have one
  - They can instant-kill you
  - They can kill you 1,000 times
